temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair and glasses, wearing a suit and tie. He looks down with a serious expression. In the foreground, the out-of-focus hand of another person is visible, holding a small, bright object. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The audio features a man speaking in a calm and decisive tone. He begins with a short, affirmative "好" (Okay). The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the man with glasses. He continues to look down, his expression unchanged. The hand in the foreground remains in the same position. The white text "风行网" is still visible in the top left. His voice then takes on a slightly hurried, matter-of-fact quality as he states, "那我先走了" (Then I'll be going first). The camera pulls back to a medium shot, showing the man with glasses from the chest up. He is now looking up and to his right, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. Another man, also in a suit, is partially visible on the right, reaching for something. The first man brings his hand to his mouth, appearing to smoke or gesture. The white text "风行网" remains on screen. Following this, a sharp, metallic clatter, like a briefcase or a hard case being placed firmly on a hard surface, is heard. The camera zooms in slightly as the second man, now more in focus, lifts a black briefcase. The first man continues to look at him, his hand still near his mouth. The white text "风行网" is still present in the top left corner. The same man then continues in a low, serious, and slightly challenging tone, "既然你不信" (Since you don't believe). The background is dark and filled with a cool, blue-toned light, creating a dramatic and tense atmosphere. The shot is tight, emphasizing the interaction between the two men and the briefcase. The audio is clear, with no background music, focusing entirely on the dialogue and the sound effect.
